learn.core_idea: Burst faults indicate capacity mismatch between active pages and available memory resources.
mechanism_steps: Apply capacity tuning to reduce churn.
learn.worked_example: A sequence larger than frame budget causes clustered faults that shrink after tuning.
common_mistakes: Treating burst faults as random noise.
Reducing faults but failing completion target.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can spot burst patterns in trace/counters.
I can explain likely capacity cause.
